ham.subject: Out of Office: John Doe
ham.body:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out. I am currently out of the office and will return on Monday, December 10. During this period, I will have limited access to my email.

For urgent matters, please contact Sarah at sarah@example.com.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
John Doe

spam.subject: Urgent: Your FedEx Shipment Missed Delivery – Fee Required
spam.body:
Dear Customer,

Our records indicate that your FedEx shipment with tracking number 123456789 was not delivered on the scheduled date. To avoid the shipment being returned to sender, a delivery fee of $25.00 must be paid immediately.

Please click the link below to complete payment:
<URL>

Failure to pay the fee within 48 hours will result in the cancellation of your shipment. If you believe this notice is in error, contact our support team at support@example.com.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
FedEx Customer Service
